items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Bayern eye move for Newcastle's Gordon
items.summary: Bayern Munich are reportedly looking to sign Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon. Transfer Talk has the latest.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Fernando Mendoza or Kirk Cousins? Raiders say "best guy will play" in Week One
items.summary: The Raiders will let Mendoza and Cousins each show what they can do in training camp before picking a Week One starter.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'There's good camaraderie' - Noor-Hosein combo starts to take shape at CSK
items.summary: "Looking to be aggressive, put revs on the ball and get the ball to spin will definitely help him a lot," Sridharan Sriram says of Noor Ahmad after the bowler's three-for agains...
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
